name: Ayrshire College
about: Ayrshire College is one of Scotland's largest colleges, serving the communities of Ayrshire from campuses in Ayr, Kilmarnock and Kilwinning. The college offers a range of computing and creative courses relevant to the games and music production industries, including a clear progression pathway from NC level through to HND in games development and sound production.

courses.name: Computer Games and Software Development
courses.short_description: A National Certificate covering the core skills required for games development and software development, providing a foundation for progression to HNC level study in computing and games development.

courses.name: Computer Games Development
courses.short_description: HNC Computer Games Development at SCQF Level 7, developing practical skills in games programming, design and digital media production. Covers the key technical disciplines needed for games development and provides a pathway to HND study and university-level programmes.

courses.name: Computer Games
courses.short_description: HND Computer Games at SCQF Level 8, building on HNC-level skills with advanced game development, 3D content creation and interactive media production. Graduates are prepared for entry-level roles in the games industry and have articulation routes to several Scottish university degree programmes.

courses.name: Sound Production
courses.short_description: HNC Sound Production at SCQF Level 7, developing skills in multi-tracking, recording, mixing, digital audio workstations and live sound. Provides a strong foundation in professional audio production relevant to games, music, film and broadcast industries.

courses.name: Sound Production
courses.short_description: HND Sound Production at SCQF Level 8, advancing skills in professional audio production, post-production and live sound engineering. Graduates are well-positioned for careers in studio recording, live events, film and television sound, and games audio, with articulation routes to degree-level study.
